metadata.title:
PRIEST. FARRELL HERE

HEAD OF PACIFIC COAST RAIL.


WAY IN SPOKANE.

pages.raw_text:
The Pacific Coast railways presi-
dent, J. D. Farrell, is making a pro-
longed visit in this city. Mr.. Far
rell is accompanied by his family
and is travelling in their private car,
"A l." which is now on the siding
at the passenger depot Of the Great
Northern. Mr.. Farrell was a pass
enger on the p. m. Great Northern
train for Seattle, making hurried
side trip.


He is practically the representa-
tive of James J. Hill on the Pacific
coast, not only having charge OF
the Pacific Coast railway, but is
also the official head of the Great
Northern steamship lines plying be-
tween the Pacific coast, China and
Japan.


He is probably 60 years of age
and a pioneer railroader.
